representation_label: Non-H2 DRI crude steel pathway bundle

description: Technology bundle for producing DRI from hydrogen, gas, or imported residual supply.

representation_label: DRI melt and refine technology bundle
description: Technology bundle for converting DRI into crude steel through EAF or electric smelter finishing.
notes: Required finishing child representation for the decomposed H2 DRI crude-steel route.
